chain_edges.notes: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched-into-May-1 trio is the inference-runtime input the focal chain prediction extends with kernel LPE.
AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog momentum (KEV adds) precedes a CSAI-CNA advisory carving out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique.
LLM-INFRA-CWE primitive supply-chain framing scaffolds the named LLM-tooling chain that the focal prediction expects to carve out.
An IR post-mortem chaining LLM-tooling + Copy Fail kernel LPE accelerates CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog publication.

relations.notes: Both predict regulator/standard recognition of AI-Infra CVE class; focal narrows to LLM-tooling + kernel chain post-mortem, peer to OWASP + CISA KEV sub-catalog.
Both forecast a regulatory primitive for AI-Infra CVEs; focal demands a named LLM-tooling+kernel chain, peer demands a CISA/NVD AI-Infra sub-catalog.
Both anchor on inference-runtime CVE class; focal adds Linux-kernel LPE chain + CSAI CNA naming, peer focuses on NVD AI-Infra tag and per-engine SBOM SKUs.
Adjacent AI-infra security predictions on different layers: focal on LLM-tooling + kernel chain, peer on MCP protocol attack surface and gateway/firewall standards.
